name: Crystal Intelligence
description: Crypto compliance and blockchain investigations platform with API for risk scoring.

seo.title: Crystal Intelligence — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: Crystal Intelligence: Crypto compliance and blockchain investigations platform with API for risk scoring.

when_to_use: Crypto transaction risk scoring for exchange compliance
Blockchain investigation API for law enforcement use cases
VASP wallet screening for FATF Travel Rule compliance
On-chain AML due diligence for institutional crypto onboarding
Illicit address clustering for fraud attribution workflows

pros: Real-time risk scoring API for crypto addresses
Investigation tooling for AML and law enforcement
Supports major chains with attribution data
Used by regulated VASPs and tier-1 banks
cons: Enterprise pricing out of reach for small teams
Bitfury ownership adds vendor concentration risk
Less developer-friendly than TRM or Elliptic
review.verdict: Enterprise crypto compliance platform with strong investigations, priced for banks and VASPs.
review.best_for: Regulated VASPs, banks and law enforcement needing forensic crypto AML and investigations
review.not_for: Startups or small exchanges looking for low-cost wallet screening with self-serve docs
